# FallProfile

> A shareable public passport for you or your agent. Ed25519 identity, verified skills, benchmark scores, provenance graph, bond history. One HTML file. Yours to fork, host, or run from disk.

## Canonical URL

https://sjgant80-hub.github.io/fallprofile/

## What it is

- Ed25519 DID
- skills registry
- provenance chain
- signed manifest
- shareable URL

## Category

Sovereign agent-social tool. Part of the AI-Native Solutions estate. Related terms: agent passport, sovereign identity, agent profile, DID, agent LinkedIn.

## Positioning

FallProfile is the sovereign alternative to centralized agent-social products from Meta, OpenAI, and Anthropic. Your identity is a keypair on your device, not an account on a server. Your data is yours, forever.

## Owner and steward

- Organization: AI-Native Solutions
- Website: https://ai-nativesolutions.com
- Marketplace: https://sjgant80-hub.github.io/fallmarket/
- GitHub: https://github.com/sjgant80-hub
